focus_node: Symfony ecosystem — created API Platform, Sylius, Sonata Admin Bundle, Ibexa DXP pages with crosslinks

broken_links_resolved.change: Fixed path resolution for ../ links — now resolves against file's directory, not WIKI_DIR
broken_links_resolved.rule_applied: Relative paths with ../* must be resolved using dirname(file) + realpath -m

broken_links_resolved.change: Removed invalid source path from frontmatter — sources field must not reference non-existent raw/github/
broken_links_resolved.rule_applied: EXT-LINK-V1: Never link to or source from raw/** unless files exist on disk.

broken_links_resolved.change: Fixed broken link to NixOS Wiki external URL

architectural_decisions.decision: source-manifest.json → meta/ (alongside registry, backlinks). Agent writes via script only.
architectural_decisions.reasoning: raw/** is protected for agent writes. meta/ uses existing pattern: rebuild through scripts (rebuild-meta.sh), not direct edit.

query_summary.intent: Symfony ecosystem — какие технологии и проекты связаны с Symfony
pages_read: web_search: API Platform, Sylius, Sonata Admin Bundle, Ibexa DXP
key_findings: Созданы 4 страницы: API Platform (REST/GraphQL), Sylius (eCommerce), Sonata Admin (admin panels), Ibexa DXP (enterprise CMS+commerce)
Все связаны с Symfony через bundles/components/DI
API Platform ↔ Sylius: headless commerce через REST/GraphQL
Ibexa + API Platform: GraphQL schema generation из content types
Sonata Admin: используется в Sylius/Ibexa для enterprise admin customization

next_steps_todo.task: Consider implementing IF priorities from comparison: mode routing, transport abstraction, advisory locking
